subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be sacrificed for your presence! The exalted missive, from which the fragrance of meanings was diffused, was as a gentle stream [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء دستخط عالی که عرف معانی از او منتشر ماء لطیفی بود از برای
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
